title: Initialize Git & Push Scaffold
description: Create branch 'feature/llm-validator' from current HEAD. No new files to scaffold — this is a modification to existing code.

title: Add validator and coverage prompts to prompts.py
description: Add VALIDATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT, build_validator_prompt(), COVERAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT, and build_coverage_prompt() to backend/app/agents/prompts.py. The validator prompt must instruct the LLM to evaluate 4 criteria (redundancy, goal_alignment, context_relevance, topic_drift) and return structured JSON with {pass: bool, reason: str|null} for each. The coverage prompt must instruct the LLM to estimate goal coverage as a float 0.0-1.0 with reasoning. Keep all existing prompt code unchanged.

title: Add GEMINI_VALIDATOR_MODEL to config and .env
description: Add GEMINI_VALIDATOR_MODEL: str = 'gemini/gemini-2.0-flash' to backend/app/core/config.py Settings class. Add GEMINI_VALIDATOR_MODEL=gemini/gemini-2.0-flash to backend/.env file.

title: Rewrite validator.py to use LLM instead of embeddings
description: Major rewrite of backend/app/agents/validator.py. REMOVE: cosine_similarity(), get_embedding(), check_redundancy(), check_goal_alignment(), check_context_relevance(), check_topic_drift() methods. Remove all threshold parameters from __init__ (redundancy_threshold, goal_alignment_threshold, context_similarity_threshold, topic_drift_threshold). REMOVE the numpy import. ADD: _get_validator_model() helper that reads settings.GEMINI_VALIDATOR_MODEL. ADD: validate_with_llm(candidate_question, survey, conversation_history) that calls litellm.acompletion() with the validator prompt from prompts.py, parses JSON response, returns (is_valid, rejection_reason). On any failure (JSON parse, LLM error), log warning and return (True, None) as graceful fallback. ADD: estimate_goal_coverage(conversation_history, goal) using litellm.acompletion() with coverage prompt, parsing float from JSON. On failure, return 0.0. UPDATE validate() to: 1) check_compound_question, 2) check_leading_question, 3) validate_with_llm. Keep check_compound_question and check_leading_question EXACTLY as they are. Use response_format={'type': 'json_object'} in the acompletion calls.

title: Rewrite validator tests for LLM-based validation
description: Rewrite backend/tests/test_validator.py. KEEP UNCHANGED: all rule-based tests (test_check_compound_question_*, test_check_leading_question_*, test_max_questions_*). REWRITE: all embedding-mocking tests to mock litellm.acompletion instead. Create a helper that builds mock LLM response objects with structured JSON content. ADD TESTS: (1) test_validate_with_llm_all_pass - all 4 criteria pass, (2) test_validate_with_llm_redundancy_fail, (3) test_validate_with_llm_goal_alignment_fail, (4) test_validate_with_llm_context_relevance_fail, (5) test_validate_with_llm_topic_drift_fail, (6) test_validate_with_llm_json_parse_error_fallback - returns valid on bad JSON, (7) test_validate_with_llm_exception_fallback - returns valid on LLM error, (8) test_estimate_goal_coverage_llm - returns float from LLM, (9) test_estimate_goal_coverage_llm_error_fallback - returns 0.0 on error. Mock litellm.acompletion at 'app.agents.validator.litellm' path. Ensure all tests pass with pytest.

title: Backend code review
description: Review backend/app/agents/validator.py, backend/app/agents/prompts.py, and backend/app/core/config.py for: (1) LLM prompt quality and clarity, (2) proper error handling and graceful fallbacks, (3) JSON parsing robustness, (4) no leftover embedding code or imports, (5) proper async patterns. File all issues as feedback.

title: Architecture review
description: Review the full change set for: (1) validate() and estimate_goal_coverage() interface stability - signatures must be unchanged, (2) no API contract breakage, (3) no frontend impact, (4) proper separation of concerns between prompts.py and validator.py, (5) model configuration approach is correct.

title: Push final changes to branch
description: Commit all changes and push to 'feature/llm-validator' branch. Commit message: 'feat: replace embedding-based validator with LLM-based validation'.
